message:
Skip link checking for PR preview builds

The starlight-links-validator doesn't handle non-root base paths,
causing false positives when building with --base /docs-previews/<N>.
Main branch builds still run link checking to catch actual broken links.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -70,7 +70,9 @@ jobs:
       - name: Build with Astro
         run: |
           if [[ "${{ github.event_name }}" == "pull_request" ]]; then
-            CHECK_LINKS=true bun run astro build \
+            # Skip link checking for PR previews - the validator doesn't handle
+            # non-root base paths, and main branch builds catch broken links.
+            bun run astro build \
               --site "https://tenzir.github.io" \
               --base "/docs-previews/${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}"
           else
